instrument_description: The MMPI-3 (Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory-3) was released in December 2020 and is a 335-item self-report assessment designed for adults aged 18 and older.  It features updated norms based on 2020 U.S. Census projections, with a nationally representative sample of 810 men and 810 women. The test is used in mental health, medical, forensic, and public safety settings.
